summary: Comprehensive testing of VivahSetu matrimonial app completed. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Core flows working with 1 React Native warning issue identified.

react_native_issues.issue: React Native warning: 'Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>'. This appears when rendering match cards with icons and text. Attempted fix in browse.tsx by wrapping icon+text in separate View containers, but issue persists. May be coming from bullet character (\u2022) in connections.tsx or other components.
react_native_issues.recommendation: Review all components that mix Ionicons with text. Ensure all text is wrapped in <Text> components and icons are in separate containers.

action_items: Fix React Native text node warning in Browse and Connections screens - ensure all text is properly wrapped in <Text> components
Consider adding more seed data for better testing of matches and connections features
Add error boundary component to catch and display React Native errors gracefully
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend properly excludes MongoDB _id and password_hash from responses
✓ All endpoints use proper HTTP status codes (200, 400, 401, 404)
✓ JWT authentication working correctly with 7-day expiry
✓ Password hashing with bcrypt implemented correctly
✓ Matches endpoint correctly filters by opposite gender
✓ Connection limits (5 max) and timer (15 days) enforced
✓ Frontend uses React Native components (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
✓ All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
✓ API calls use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from environment
⚠ React Native warning about text nodes needs attention (non-critical but should be fixed)
seed_data_creation: Created test user: uitest_15327@example.com / test123 (Female) for frontend testing. Backend tests create and cleanup their own test data with unique emails.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs tested and working. Frontend login, registration, navigation, browse, and connections screens tested. One React Native warning about text nodes in View components needs investigation. Test credentials in /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Public URL: https://bride-connect-3.preview.emergentagent.com
